name: veteranfinder
description: VeteranFinder - Veteran reconnection and community platform

scripts.install:apps: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web && npm install --prefix apps/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix apps/api && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/web && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix apps/api && npm run lint --prefix apps/web && npm run lint --prefix apps/admin
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix apps/api && npm run build --prefix apps/web && npm run build --prefix apps/admin
